mapper.update: INSERT INTO cv_user_history (uid, vid, part, watch_time,update_time) VALUES (#{uid}, #{vid}, #{part}, #{watchTime}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE part = VALUES(part), watch_time = VALUES(watch_time), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
mapper.select: select vid as id, uid ,vid from cv_user_history where uid = #{uid} and (vid in (select id from cv_video_info where name like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%'))) order by update_time desc
select id, uid, vid, part, watch_time, update_time from cv_user_history
select id, uid, vid, part, watch_time, update_time from cv_user_history where vid = #{vid} and uid = #{uid}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cv_user_history (uid, vid, part, watch_time,update_time) VALUES
(#{item.uid}, #{item.vid}, #{item.part}, #{item.watchTime},#{item.updateTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE watch_time = VALUES(watch_time), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
mapper.delete: delete from cv_user_history where uid = #{uid} and vid=#{vid}
